worktree_state.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!--
  ~ Launcher icon foreground drawable
  ~ Used as the foreground layer for adaptive icons on Android 8.0+ (API 26+)
  ~ This is a simple placeholder that displays a stylized "I" for Inventory
  -->
<vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:width="108dp"
    android:height="108dp"
    android:viewportWidth="108"
    android:viewportHeight="108">
    <group
        android:scaleX="0.5"
        android:scaleY="0.5"
        android:translateX="27"
        android:translateY="27">
        <!-- Simple "I" letter for Inventory app -->
        <path
            android:fillColor="#FFFFFF"
            android:pathData="M42,20h24v8h-8v44h8v8h-24v-8h8v-44h-8z" />
    </group>
</vector>

task_intent.title: 001-initialize-project-scaffolding-with-standard-andro
task_intent.description: Scaffold a standard Android project structure with Gradle build files, an Application class, a main Activity, and a manifest. This establishes the foundational code patterns that all future features will build upon.
